items.title: Prof. Di Zhu Awarded the McKnight Land-Grant Professorship by the University of Minnesota
items.description: McKnight Land-Grant Professor 2026-2028The University of Minnesota has awarded Professor Di Zhu the McKnight Land-Grant Professorship.
